data.content:
Удав
Mythical snake that swallowed an elephant in the illustration and was compared to a hat by adults. Original name: удав, which is a type of large Asian snake.

Джунгли
Vast tropical rainforest where the story takes place, specifically referring to the dense jungle with mythological creatures like the giant snake. Original name: джунгли.

Учитель
Adult who advised the narrator not to draw outside of his understanding and expertise, especially about animals and geography. Original name: учитель.

Художник
Childhood aspiration of the narrator, a profession that he gave up after failing at drawing an inside-out snake and being ridiculed by adults. Original name: художник.

Летчик
Another career chosen after abandoning childhood aspirations to become an artist. Original name: летчик.

Китай
Country in East Asia, where the narrator mentioned it can be distinguished from Arizona. Original name: Китай.

Аризона
State of United States, used by the narrator as a comparison to distinguish between different places. Original name: Аризона.

Слон
The large mammal that was swallowed by the giant snake.

Тот человек
Human individual who survived a plane crash in the Sahara desert and decided to fix his broken engine alone for survival.

Маленький принц
A young boy appearing as an otherworldly visitor from space, whose existence is unexplained and leads to adventures with the narrator.<SEP>Unnamed prince who lived on a planet smaller than himself and desired a companion.<SEP>Unnamed prince who lived on a planet full of plants and creatures, with the ability to understand the significance of small seeds that could become huge baobabs. He was curious about his surroundings, especially the baobabs and their impact.<SEP>Unnamed prince who lived on a planet full of plants and creatures, with the ability to understand the significance of small seeds that could become huge baobabs. He was also able to draw pictures to help others understand the importance.<SEP>Unnamed prince who lived on a planet full of plants and creatures, with the ability to understand the significance of small seeds that could become huge baobabs. He tried to warn others about the potential dangers of baobabs.<SEP>Unnamed prince who lived on a planet full of plants and creatures, with the ability to understand the significance of small seeds that could become huge baobabs. He warned about the dangers of baobabs.<SEP>Human character in the story

О Маленький принц!
Unnamed prince in a story about the universe.

Маленький принц!
Unnamed prince in a story about the universe.

Понемногу я понял также, как печальна и однообразна была твоя жизнь.
Describing the life of the unnamed prince as one-sided and monotonous.
data.entity_name: Понемногу я понял также, как печальна и однообразна была твоя жизнь.

data.content:
Я очень люблю закат.
Expressing a fondness for sunset by the unnamed prince.

Солнце зашло.
Noting that the sun has set in the unnamed prince's view.

Знаешь… когда станет очень грустно, хорошо поглядеть, как заходит солнце…
Expressing a thought about looking at sunset when one feels very sad by the unnamed prince.
data.entity_name: Знаешь… когда станет очень грустно, хорошо поглядеть, как заходит солнце…

data.content:
Ты видел сорок три заката.
Counting forty-three sunsets by the unnamed prince.
